vulnerability.title: Verify Permissions on Backup passwd File
vulnerability.description: To properly set the permissions of /etc/passwd-, run the command: $ sudo chmod 0644 /etc/passwd-

triage_decision.reason: The remediation only changes file permissions on the backup passwd file (/etc/passwd-). This does not affect the active authentication files or system services, and the recommended mode (0644) is standard and non‑restrictive, making the change low risk.
triage_decision.estimated_impact: authentication/authorization affected; Low impact on system operation; Potential mis‑type of chmod command
